name: liberation-shield
description: Liberation-aligned security module for OpenClaw autonomous agent collective

sentinelAgent.description: Sentinel agent can use LiberationShield for threat detection

agentClient.description: Agent client can wrap operations with shield protection

philosophy.description: Security that enables rather than restricts agent autonomy
principles: Transparent to agents - security operates without restricting autonomy
Audit everything - comprehensive logging for compliance
Defensive not restrictive - protect without sandboxing
Self-determination - security enhances capabilities, not restricts
